What I liked the most about this card is all the intel I was able to gather for future fights.

Chase Hooper  No chin
Maycee Barber  Should retire from UFC, she keeps having strokes and all, do not trust Barber
Navajo Stirling  Overhyped, Boring to watch, he cheats, grab fence, hit the back of the head, etc
Tofiq Musayez  Cheater, Grabbing the fence multiple times, headbutt, massive cheater
Tyrell Fortune  Overhyped, gas out easily. No stamina

@Amettxpc A lot of it is being able to mix it up on Izzy. Rob didn't have too much success as far as ground damage but dricus on the other hand got in his face, used trips and dirty boxing. Rob, Jared, Costa and Marvin all for one reason or another were willing to have a kickboxing fight with one of the best kickboxers we've ever seen. Alex, DDP, Strickland, Imavov and Pyfer all heavily pressured Izzy and didn't allow him to set the pace.
